title: When Forgiveness Was a Trap - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviewed historian and author Ada Palmer on the Dwarkesh Patel podcast. The episode title suggests a historical or philosophical discussion about forgiveness as a historical phenomenon.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian and author Ada Palmer on his podcast about forgiveness treated as a historical phenomenon rather than a purely personal virtue. The title's framing, forgiveness as a trap, points to a discussion of contexts in which forgiveness carried risk or served as a mechanism of power. The summary supplies only this framing, so the specific cases and arguments are not detailed here.
